title: Cell-type annotation (Cell Ontology) for pilot datasets
context: M2 annotation. Ontology-backed cell labels with 100% source citation and DR sign-off. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Annotate pilot datasets with Cell Ontology cell-type labels and cited program scores, every label sourced.
acceptanceCriteria: Every cell/cluster label is a valid CL term; method + confidence recorded.
100% of labels carry a source citation (paper/marker-set); DR sign-off recorded.
Program scores reference only license-clean, citable signatures (from anno-001).
